# Active Mirror Beacon — Public Field Notes

## What
Active Mirror Beacon is the public field-note and proof surface for Active Mirror.
It covers consumer scam checks, portable AI identity, operator trust layers, and build updates without relying on brittle marketing claims.

## Capabilities
- Public scam-check demos via Chetana
- Portable AI identity via Mirror Seed
- Governed proof and receipt surfaces
- Build logs and reflections
- Private operator tooling behind public routes

## Links
- Main: https://activemirror.ai
- Blog: https://beacon.activemirror.ai
- Docs: https://docs.activemirror.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/MirrorDNA-Reflection-Protocol
- Skills: https://github.com/MirrorDNA-Reflection-Protocol/sovereign-ai-skills
